title: Scenario-Based Modeling Workflow
description: A flowchart depicting the iterative process of creating and refining scenario-based models using use cases for requirements analysis.
relationships: Process begins with identifying actors and their goals
Leads to the development of an initial use case
The use case is detailed with a main success scenario
Alternative and exception paths are then identified
An activity diagram can be created to visualize the flow
The model is reviewed and validated with stakeholders
Feedback from review leads to refinement of the model, creating an iterative loop
